Serialized Form

  • Package mvc.controller

    • Class mvc.controller.HistoryManager

      class HistoryManager extends jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • dbManager
          DBManager dbManager
          Database manager takes care of all communication with the DB.
        • model
          Model model
          Reference to the Model in MVC pattern which stores the historical data which we need.

    • Class mvc.controller.ProcessInput

      class ProcessInput extends jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • dbErrorMessage
          String dbErrorMessage
          Special message generated in case there was problem with persisting data in the DB.
        • dbManager
          DBManager dbManager
          Database Manager mediates in communication between servlets and the database.
        • model
          Model model
          Reference to the Model instance, which is created in the ContextListener.
        • stats
          HashMap<String,Integer> stats
          Stores values of statistics cookies so that they can be use d without iterating over the list of cookies. Stored values are: number of encodings, number of decodings, number of errors. Names of keys in the map correspond to the names of cookies.

  • Package mvc.model

    • Class mvc.model.TableInput

      class TableInput extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • id
          Long id
          The primary key of a row in the table.
        • inputValue
          String inputValue
          Value stored in the table entry.

    • Class mvc.model.TableOutput

      class TableOutput extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • id
          Long id
          Primary key for a single entry in the table.
        • outputValue
          String outputValue
          Result of some operation.
        • tableInput
          TableInput tableInput
          A one-to-one mapping from the Inputs table to the outputs table. Each output can be associated with only a single input.

    • Exception Class mvc.model.UnknownPhonogramException

      class UnknownPhonogramException extends Exception implements Serializable
